news.paragraph: Oklo shares have experienced volatility recently, with a notable 5% drop on May 19th, alongside other nuclear energy stocks. Despite this dip, some analysts view Oklo as a strong long-term energy play, citing "major growth drivers" and "fresh AI-nuclear milestones" following Q1 results. Investors are also noting the company's "rapid NRC approval" which has reset expectations for its Aurora project, with a significant date marked for July 4th.
